outlook.volatilityExpectation: Highly volatile. Negative total GEX will amplify directional moves.
outlook.summary: The market is in a highly unstable state with massively negative GEX across all expiries. A strong 'smirk' volatility skew and extremely high Put/Call Ratios confirm heavy bearish hedging. Spot is actively pinned to the 0DTE Max Pain at 709, trapped between the massive 700 Put Wall and the 710 Call Wall. Expect sharp, amplified price swings if 700 or 710 are breached.

levels.motivazione: Massive Call OI across all expirations: 0DTE (8851), WEEKLY (15328), and MONTHLY (35574). Heavy dealer short gamma cap.
Significant Put OI across all expirations: WEEKLY (61126), MONTHLY (34125), and 0DTE (11331). Ultimate structural support.
0DTE Max Pain is just cents from spot. Extreme pinning risk as market makers defend this level to expire options worthless.
Heavy Put OI in MONTHLY (78189) and WEEKLY (15605). Deep institutional downside hedge and major structural floor.
Dominant Call OI in WEEKLY (18103) and MONTHLY (25157). Acts as an absolute ceiling for any upside breakout attempts.
Concentrated Put OI in 0DTE (9120) and WEEKLY (11971). Immediate short-term support below the current spot price.
High Call OI in 0DTE (10894) and WEEKLY (16169). Secondary intraday resistance capping upward movement.
Highest single-expiry Call OI in 0DTE (17610) with active volume. Micro-resistance before the 720 level.

outlook.summary: Spot is trapped between massive Put support at 650 and Call resistance at 655/660. With heavily negative aggregate GEX and extreme put buying (PCR 2.62), dealers are short gamma, meaning any drop toward 650 will trigger volatile hedging flows. However, 0DTE Max Pain exactly at 652 suggests a strong magnetic pinning effect for the current session.

levels.motivazione: Massive Put Open Interest (14k 0DTE, 8k Weekly, 6k Monthly) creates a triple-expiry structural support exactly at the round number.
Dominant Call resistance across all expirations (5.8k 0DTE, 9.5k Weekly, 32k Monthly) marks a firm upside cap.
0DTE Max Pain is situated just above the current spot price, acting as an aggressive gravitational pull for intraday price action.
Major structural Put support with heavy OI in Weekly (20k) and Monthly (13k) expirations, serving as the definitive downside buffer.
Significant Call OI across all timeframes (5.3k 0DTE, 5.3k Weekly, 20k Monthly) provides immediate intraday resistance.
Weekly Gamma Flip level situated just below current price and aligning with the 650 support cluster; losing this shifts dealer hedging to selling.

Sentiment is balanced with a slight bearish tilt in 0DTE PCR, but mechanics favor range-bound trading.
